2023-T1-P1-S12.trunk: S+be+表语从句：Another issue is that …（另一个问题是…）
structure: └ 表语从句(that)：while climate change is well integrated …, it is not as well represented …
├ 让步状语从句(while)：while climate change is well integrated into some subjects and at some ages（破折号插入举例：such as earth and space sciences in high schools）
└ 主句（表语从句内）：it is not as well represented in curricula for younger children and in subjects that are more widely taught
└ 定语从句〔that，修饰 subjects〕：that are more widely taught（such as biology and chemistry 举例）
2023-T1-P1-S12.logic: 主句 Another issue is that…（表语从句）；表语从句内含 while 让步从句 + 主句 it is not as well represented…；that 定语从句修饰 subjects。
notes: Another issue is that…：that 引导表语从句。
while climate change is well integrated…, it is not as well represented…：表语从句内的 while 让步从句 + 主句（虽…但…）。
subjects that are more widely taught：that 定语从句修饰 subjects；not as well represented 没有那么好地体现（as…as 的省略比较）。

2023-T1-P1-S6.trunk: 倒装提示语 + 引语(what 主语从句)：says Dan Quinn …，「What … kids learn … is determined … by …」
structure: 倒装提示语：says Dan Quinn, senior communications strategist at the Texas Freedom Network, a non-profit group that monitors public education（= Dan Quinn says）
├ 同位语①〔说明 Dan Quinn〕：senior communications strategist at the Texas Freedom Network
└ 同位语②〔说明 the Texas Freedom Network〕：a non-profit group（定语从句 that monitors public education 修饰之）
引语：What millions of Texas kids learn in their public schools is determined too often by the political ideology of partisan board members, rather than facts and sound scholarship
├ 主语从句(What)：What millions of Texas kids learn in their public schools
└ 谓语(被动) + 对比：is determined too often by … , rather than facts and sound scholarship
2023-T1-P1-S6.logic: says + 主语 倒装；多重同位语（strategist…、a non-profit group that…）；引语主语是 What 从句，谓语被动 is determined by…（rather than 对比）。
notes: says Dan Quinn…：引语提示语的倒装；后接多重同位语（strategist… / a non-profit group that monitors…）。
What millions of Texas kids learn…：what 主语从句作引语主语。
is determined … by … rather than …：被动 + rather than 对比（由…而非…决定）。

2023-T1-P1-S8.trunk: S+V+双宾：A study … gave barely half of US states a grade B+ or higher（一项研究只给约一半的美国各州评了 B+ 或以上）
structure: 主句：A study last year by the National Center for Science Education … gave barely half of US states a grade B+ or higher
├ 同位语〔说明 the National Center for Science Education〕：a non-profit group of scientists and teachers
├ 现在分词作定语〔修饰 A study〕：looking at how state public schools across the country address climate change in science classes
│   └ 介词宾语从句(how，作 looking at 的宾语)：how state public schools … address climate change
└ 双宾语：gave [barely half of US states] [a grade B+ or higher]
2023-T1-P1-S8.logic: 主语 A study（同位语 + looking at… 现在分词定语，造成主谓分隔），谓语 gave sb sth（双宾语）；how… 是 looking at 的宾语从句。
notes: 主谓分隔：主语 A study 与谓语 gave 被长同位语和 looking at… 现在分词定语隔开。
looking at how…：现在分词作定语修饰 A study；how 引导宾语从句（考察…如何应对气候变化）。
gave barely half of US states a grade B+ or higher：give sb sth 双宾语（给…评了 B+ 或以上）。
